stemHtml: Night is defined as the period between the end of (1) _____ and the beginning of (2) _____, or such other period between sunset and sunrise.

options.a: (1) evening civil twilight; (2) morning civil twilight.
options.b: (1) evening civil sunset; (2) morning civil sunrise.
options.c: (1) morning civil twilight; (2) evening civil twilight.
options.d: (1) evening civil twilight; (2) morning civil sunrise.
